ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disease_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Total amount of disease cases */,
  "amount_virus_diagnosis" INTEGER /* Number of virus diagnoses */,
  "amount_magen" INTEGER /* Number of Magen cases */,
  "positive_amount" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the locations table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data_sources table */,
  "disease_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease_types table */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age_groups table */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genders table */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_data_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_data_disease_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_type_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virus_diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease_data table */,
  "virus_type" TEXT /* Type of virus diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patients table */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test_types table */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospitals table */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virus_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virus_diagnoses_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virus_diagnoses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disease_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virus_diagnoses_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magen_cases" (
  "magen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Magen case */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease_data table */,
  "case_description" TEXT /* Description of the Magen case */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date of the Magen case */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patients table */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospitals table */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("magen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_magen_cases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_magen_cases_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disease_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_magen_cases_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization rate entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease_data table */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate */,
  "rate_date" TEXT /* Date of the hospitalization rate entry */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospitals table */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age_groups table */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genders table */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_rates_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_rates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disease_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_rates_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_rates_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the population */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the population */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the locations table */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_types" (
  "disease_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the disease type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genders table */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the locations table */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the locations table */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
